title: Pitch accent
description: Pitch accent data for Japanese words, derived from the Kanjium accents.txt file. Each entry maps a word (in kanji+kana form) to its pitch accent mora positions. Accent positions are 0 for heiban (flat) or N where the accent falls after the Nth mora.

coverage_date.description: Approximate date through which the upstream source has been maintained. Vocabulary added after this date is unlikely to have pitch accent data.

word.description: Word spelling, typically containing kanji. Matches the first column of Kanjium's accents.txt.

reading.description: Kana-only reading of the word, used for pitch accent alignment.

pitch_positions.description: Pitch accent mora positions. 0 = heiban (flat, no drop). N = accent falls after mora N. Multiple values mean multiple accepted accent patterns exist.

mora_count.description: Number of morae in the reading, for convenience.
